title: capsella subseleniaca
intro: Capsella subseleniaca, also known as shepherd's cress, is a biennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of shepherd's cress include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Capsella subseleniaca include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
